# Staxel Voxel Female Reference Intake

This folder stores an external CC BY reference model for Phase 53b/53c voxel-generator development.

This asset is useful for:
- validating GLB intake paths,
- checking voxel-character silhouette/proportion expectations,
- testing MagicaVoxel / Blockbench / Blender round trips,
- comparing Starlight Ridge generated body templates against an existing voxel-character style.

It should not become the direct canonical Starlight Ridge base character. The canonical base characters should be produced by the in-project pixel-voxel generator and then manually refined.

Required attribution is stored in `ATTRIBUTION.md`.
